title: AnnounceX
description: рҹ“ў Professional announcements with custom durations, colors, sounds & particles! Title + BossBar modes. Perfect for events! вҡЎ
body:
**[вҡ пёҸ]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

# рҹ“ў AnnounceX - Advanced Announcement System

## рҹҺҜ What is it?

AnnounceX is a powerful **Minecraft 1.21+** plugin for displaying beautiful announcements! Show messages in the **center of screen** (title) or on the **top bar** (bossbar) with custom durations, sounds, and particle effects! рҹҺү

---

## вңЁ Features

- рҹ“ә **Title announcements** - Large text in center of screen
- рҹ“Ҡ **BossBar announcements** - Animated bar at the top
- вҸ° **Custom durations** - 30s, 5m, 1h, 2d, 1h30m
- рҹ”Ҡ **Sound effects** - Pleasant notification sounds
- вңЁ **Particle effects** - Magical particles around players
- рҹҺЁ **Full color support** - All `&` color codes
- рҹӨ– **Auto announcements** - Configure in config.yml
- рҹ“Ҡ **Real-time tracking** - See active announcements with time left

---

## рҹҺ® Commands

### рҹ“ә Title (Center Screen)
```
/announcetitle <message>
/announcetitle <time> <message>
```

**Examples:**
```
/announcetitle &c&lIMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT!
/announcetitle 30s &c&lSERVER RESTART IN 5 MIN!
/announcetitle 5m &e&lEvent is now active!
/announcetitle 1h &a&l2x EXP Active!
```

### рҹ“Ҡ BossBar (Top Bar)
```
/announcebossbar <message>
/announcebossbar <time> <message>
```

**Examples:**
```
/announcebossbar &d&lWelcome to the server!
/announcebossbar 2m &d&lвҡ” PvP Event in progress!
/announcebossbar 1h &6&lрҹ’° Shop sale - 50% off!
```

### рҹӣ пёҸ Management
```
/announcex                    - Show help
/announcex list              - Show active announcements
/announcex clear titles      - Remove all titles
/announcex clear bossbars    - Remove all bossbars
/announcex clear all         - Remove everything
/announcex reload            - Reload config
```

---

## вҸұпёҸ Time Formats

| Format | Duration | Example |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `30s` | 30 seconds | Quick messages |
| `5m` | 5 minutes | Short events |
| `1h` | 1 hour | Long events |
| `2d` | 2 days | Weekend events |
| `1h30m` | 1h 30min | Mixed format |

---

## рҹҺЁ Color Codes

Use `&` for colors and formatting:

**Colors:** `&0-9`, `&a-f` (black to white)
**Format:** `&l` bold, `&o` italic, `&n` underline, `&m` strikethrough

**Example:**
```
/announcetitle &6&lвӯҗ &e&nWelcome &6&lвӯҗ
```

---

## рҹ”‘ Permissions

- `announcex.title` - Use /announcetitle
- `announcex.bossbar` - Use /announcebossbar
- `announcex.admin` - Use management commands

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Config.yml

```yaml
# Title settings
title-interval: 300          # Auto announcement interval (seconds)
title-fade-in: 10           # Fade in (ticks)
title-stay: 60              # Default duration (ticks)
title-fade-out: 10          # Fade out (ticks)
title-play-sound: true
title-show-particles: true

title-announcements:
  

# BossBar settings
bossbar-interval: 180        # Auto announcement interval (seconds)
bossbar-duration: 100        # Default duration (ticks)
bossbar-color: PURPLE        # PINK, BLUE, RED, GREEN, YELLOW, PURPLE, WHITE
bossbar-play-sound: true

bossbar-announcements:
 
```

---

## рҹ’Ў Usage Examples

### Server Restart
```bash
/announcetitle 5m &c&lвҡ  RESTART IN 5 MINUTES!
/announcetitle 1m &c&lвҡ  RESTART IN 1 MINUTE!
/announcetitle 10s &4&lвҡ  RESTARTING NOW!
```

### Events
```bash
/announcebossbar 30m &e&lвҡ” PvP Event! /warp pvp
/announcex list  # Check active
/announcex clear all  # Clean up after
```

### Promotions
```bash
/announcebossbar 1h &6&lрҹ’° HAPPY HOUR! 50% OFF!
```

---

## рҹ“Ҡ List Active Announcements

```
/announcex list
```

**Output:**
```
========= Active Announcements =========

вӯҗ TITLE (center of screen):
  вҖў &c&lRESTART IN 5 MINUTES!
    Time left: 4m 23s

в–  BOSSBAR (top bar):
  вҖў &d&lвҡ” PvP Event in progress!
    Time left: 1h 15m 30s
========================================
```

---

## рҹҺҜ Pro Tips

1. рҹҺЁ **Don't overdo colors** - 2-3 colors per message
2. вҸ° **Quick: 10-30s, Important: 5m+**
3. рҹ“Ҡ **BossBar for ongoing events**
4. рҹ“ә **Title for urgent messages**
5. рҹ”„ **Check `/announcex list`** before sending new
6. рҹ§№ **Clean up with `/announcex clear all`**
7. вңЁ **Use emojis:** вӯҗ рҹ’Һ вҡ” рҹҸҶ рҹ’° вқӨ вҡЎ

---

## рҹҡҖ Quick Start

```bash
# Welcome message (1 minute)
/announcetitle 1m &6&lвӯҗ WELCOME! Check /rules

# Daily vote reminder (5 minutes)
/announcebossbar 5m &b&lрҹ’Һ Vote with /vote!

# Event announcement (30 minutes)
/announcebossbar 30m &d&lвҡ” Tournament! /warp arena

# Check what's running
/announcex list

# Clear all
/announcex clear all
```

---

## рҹҗӣ Troubleshooting

**Not showing?**
- Check permissions
- Use correct time format: `30s` not `30`
- Verify config settings

**Stop early?**
- `/announcex clear titles` or `/announcex clear bossbars`

**Colors not working?**
- Use `&` not `В§`

---

## рҹҺҠ Features Summary

вң… Two display modes (Title & BossBar)  
вң… Custom time durations  
вң… Sound & particle effects  
вң… Full color & formatting  
вң… Real-time tracking  
вң… Easy management  
вң… Auto announcements  
вң… Zero lag - highly optimized  

**Perfect for:** Announcements, Events, Warnings, Promotions! рҹҺү

---

*Made with вқӨпёҸ for Minecraft 1.21+*
